'''kothataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kummerian|kummerian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kummerian|kummerian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kothataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothatithi|kothatithi]] || [[word:kothatiji|kothatiji]] || [[word:kothatishi|kothatishi]] || [[word:kothatiki|kothatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothatuthuthu|kothatuthuthu]] || [[word:kothatujuju|kothatujuju]] || [[word:kothatushushu|kothatushushu]] || [[word:kothatukuku|kothatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothatuthu|kothatuthu]] || [[word:kothatuju|kothatuju]] || [[word:kothatushu|kothatushu]] || [[word:kothatuku|kothatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothatufthuf|kothatufthuf]] || [[word:kothatufjuf|kothatufjuf]] || [[word:kothatufshuf|kothatufshuf]] || [[word:kothatufkuf|kothatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothatethe|kothatethe]] || [[word:kothateje|kothateje]] || [[word:kothateshe|kothateshe]] || [[word:kothateke|kothateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothatothotho|kothatothotho]] || [[word:kothatojojo|kothatojojo]] || [[word:kothatoshosho|kothatoshosho]] || [[word:kothatokoko|kothatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothatotho|kothatotho]] || [[word:kothatojo|kothatojo]] || [[word:kothatosho|kothatosho]] || [[word:kothatoko|kothatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothatofthof|kothatofthof]] || [[word:kothatofjof|kothatofjof]] || [[word:kothatofshof|kothatofshof]] || [[word:kothatofkof|kothatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfthĂŻf|kothatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfjĂŻf|kothatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfshĂŻf|kothatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfkĂŻf|kothatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kothatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kothatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kothatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kothatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfthĂŻf|kothatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfjĂŻf|kothatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfshĂŻf|kothatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfkĂŻf|kothatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfthĂŻf|kothatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfjĂŻf|kothatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfshĂŻf|kothatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothatĂŻfkĂŻf|kothatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothatĂŠthĂŠ|kothatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kothatĂŠjĂŠ|kothatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kothatĂŠshĂŠ|kothatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kothatĂŠkĂŠ|kothatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothatathatha|kothatathatha]] || [[word:kothatajaja|kothatajaja]] || [[word:kothatashasha|kothatashasha]] || [[word:kothatakaka|kothatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothatatha|kothatatha]] || [[word:kothataja|kothataja]] || [[word:kothatasha|kothatasha]] || [[word:kothataka|kothataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothatafthaf|kothatafthaf]] || [[word:kothatafjaf|kothatafjaf]] || [[word:kothatafshaf|kothatafshaf]] || [[word:kothatafkaf|kothatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kothatasha|kothatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothatshĂ«asha|kothatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothatroasha|kothatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothatmuasha|kothatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothatyaasha|kothatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothatnkshĂ«asha|gokothatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothatnkroasha|gokothatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothatnkmuasha|gokothatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothatnkyaasha|gokothatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kothathatasha|kothathatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothathatshĂ«asha|kothathatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothathatroasha|kothathatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothathatmuasha|kothathatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothathatyaasha|kothathatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothathatnkshĂ«asha|gokothathatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothathatnkroasha|gokothathatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothathatnkmuasha|gokothathatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothathatnkyaasha|gokothathatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kethĂŠtasha|kethĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kethĂŠtshĂ«asha|kethĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kethĂŠtroasha|kethĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kethĂŠtmuasha|kethĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kethĂŠtyaasha|kethĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokethĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gokethĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokethĂŠtnkroasha|gokethĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokethĂŠtnkmuasha|gokethĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokethĂŠtnkyaasha|gokethĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kothfatasha|kothfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothfatshĂ«asha|kothfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothfatroasha|kothfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothfatmuasha|kothfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothfatyaasha|kothfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothfatnkshĂ«asha|gokothfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothfatnkroasha|gokothfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothfatnkmuasha|gokothfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothfatnkyaasha|gokothfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
